emails.subject: RE: Letter to Rescind Offer
emails.body: RE: Letter to Rescind Offer Michelle After getting your message regarding the waiver, and discussing it with Hector McLoughlin, I've added some language to the original letter.

emails.subject: RE: Letter to Rescind Offer
emails.body: The minimum number of days should be 21, and they should have 7 days to revoke it. Although the ADEA probably would not apply to A&A candidates, it could be an issue for the rest of the organization. Michelle

emails.subject: FW: Letter to Rescind Offer
emails.body: FW: Letter to Rescind Offer Michelle What are your thoughts on this? Terry
